specifications.transmission: 6-speed Electronically Controlled automatic Transmission with intelligence (ECT-i)

exterior: LED headlights, daytime running lights, and taillights
interior: Entune Premium Audio with Integrated Navigation and App Suite
Smart Key System with Push Button Start
Frameless auto-dimming rearview mirror with HomeLink

production_and_photography_metadata.paint_enhancement_requirements: Enhance metallic flakes in the Magnetic Gray paint during post-production; manage reflections on the broad, flat side panels.
production_and_photography_metadata.tire_treatment: Apply matte tire dressing to avoid harsh highlights during exterior shots.
production_and_photography_metadata.lighting_conditions: Optimum capture in golden hour or overcast environments to prevent blowout on the 18-inch SuperChrome wheels and emphasize the deep gray tones.
